devicesTabs.overviewDescription: How this computer is set up to work with your AI staff.
devicesTabs.browserDescription: Install and pick the browser your agents should drive.
devicesTabs.permissionsDescription: Choose who can use this computer, and how they need to be approved.
devicesTabs.myDevicesDescription: Every computer you've linked to your account.
devicesTabs.auditDescription: A record of every time an agent used one of your devices.
devicesTabs.placeholder: Coming soon. We're still building this.

myDevicesHelpIntro: These are the computers you've authorized for AI staff. Once enabled, an agent can run real commands, access files, open apps, and browse the web on that machine — not just chat.
myDevicesHelpAccess: This computer belongs to you, not to any workspace — switching workspaces won't touch these settings. By default only your Personal Staff can use it, and your Personal Staff only talks to you — nobody else. Any other agent needs your hands-on approval.

overview.masterSwitchDescription: Turn this off and no agent can use this computer — even ones you approved before.
overview.systemPermsDescription: macOS needs to grant a few permissions before agents can fully use this machine.

screenRecording.label: Screen Recording
screenRecording.description: Let agents see what's on your screen.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Let agents click, type, and move windows for you.

automation.label: Automation
automation.description: Let agents run commands and control other apps.

fullDiskAccess.label: Full Disk Access
fullDiskAccess.description: Let agents read and write files anywhere on this Mac.

confirmRemoveThisMac: Remove this device? The daemon will disconnect and your ahand identity will be cleared.
confirmRemove: Remove {{name}}? That device will lose its connection.

error.hubUnavailable: Remote service unavailable. Please try again.
error.deviceRevoked: aHand: this device is no longer authorized. Please re-enable.

ctaTitle: Let an agent actually use your computer
ctaBody: Want an agent to really drive your computer and browser — not just chat? Grab our desktop app and pair this machine in seconds.
noAppInstalledHint: If nothing happened, the desktop app may not be installed yet.
